headline: CF Industries and Norwegian Cruise Line have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: CF Industries gains from tight global fertilizer supplies and low U.S. gas prices, while Norwegian Cruise Line faces higher fuel costs and weak demand.

headline: Bull of the Day: CF Industries (CF)
summary: As a global fertilizer shortage looms and the Strait of Hormuz faces an unprecedented blockade, one North American giant is stepping in to fill the void.

headline: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: CF Industries and Intrepid Potash
summary: CF and IPI are gaining momentum as rising inflation, higher commodity prices and strong earnings lift fertilizer stocks in 2026.
